text_blocks.text: The Sieve of Eratosthenes is a brute-force algorithm for finding all

text_blocks.text: prime numbers less than some value n

text_blocks.text: Step 1: List the numbers less than n
Step 2: If the next available number is less than √n, cross out all

runs.text: If the next available number is less than √n, cross out all

text_blocks.text: Step 3:  Repeat until the next available number is > √n

runs.text: Repeat until the next available number is > √n

text_blocks.text: Step 4: All remaining numbers are prime
